features.name: dynamic vector indexing with signal select
features.description: Code should include a 2-bit vector indexed by a signal to select between bits

features.name: partial vector update via concatenation
features.description: Code should include a vector element updated using concatenation with its own bit
features.snippet:
reg [0:1] data [0:0];
always @(posedge clk) data[0] <= {di, data[0][0]};
